provenance: Derived material: shatter product of lightstone (WorldBible section 9 - releasing the energy too suddenly shatters it; ARCHITECTURE section 11 shatter trace). Numbers invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing.
notes: Inert glass rubble: not chargeable, emits nothing (the section 11 trace removes the light emitter the same tick the stone shatters). Low opacity (6) - a heap of clear fragments barely blocks light. Worth ~3% of an intact stone.
